Donate Now
DONATE

Every Family That Calls Us
Has the Same Fear.
Every Gift You Give
Is the Answer.

Every week, a parent calls Anandalok with a breaking voice. The fear is always the same — who will love my child when I am gone? Your donation funds the answer.

We Have the Land.
We Have the Love.
We Need You.

Right now, 35 individuals with autism call Anandalok home. They live, learn, create, and thrive on our 2.4-acre campus near Kolkata. Sixteen full-time staff members care for them every single day.

But our campus can hold many more. And the families who need us are not running out.

Every month, we turn away desperate families because we do not have the infrastructure to welcome their children. Parents who have spent years searching for a safe place. Siblings who lie awake wondering what happens when their parents are gone. Families who have been told their child is a burden — and who refuse to believe it.

Our goal is to expand from 35 residents to 100. To do that, we need to build new residential wings, hire additional trained staff, equip new classrooms and therapy spaces, and create the infrastructure that transforms empty rooms into someone's forever home.

That is where you come in.

100

Our Goal residents

35 Residents Today65 To Go

Your Gift, Their World

Every rupee you give has a name, a face, and a story attached to it.

₹5,000

A Month of Meals

Three nutritious meals a day for one resident for an entire month. That is 90 moments of nourishment, community, and the simple dignity of a full plate.

₹15,000

A Month of Complete Care

Meals, medical support, therapeutic sessions, creative activities, and round-the-clock supervision for one resident for one month. Everything that turns a building into a home.

₹30,000

A Year of Learning

Art supplies, educational materials, computer training resources, and vocational tools for one resident for an entire year. The materials that help someone find their voice.

₹50,000

One Full Year of Life

Complete annual support for one resident — meals, care, medical attention, education, creative programmes, and a place to belong. Fifty thousand rupees is the difference between isolation and purpose.

₹1,00,00,000

40 New Homes

Fund the infrastructure to welcome 40 more residents to Anandalok. New residential wings, trained staff, equipped classrooms, and therapy spaces. This is a legacy.

Every amount matters. If none of these tiers fit, give what your heart tells you. There is no minimum.

How to Send Your Contribution

INR Contributions

Indian Donations

Bank Name

Canara Bank, Sarat Bose Road Branch

Account Name

Welfare Centre for the Mentally Handicapped

Account No

0323101028321

IFSC Code

CNRB0000323

All remittances must be drawn in favour of Welfare Centre for the Mentally Handicapped

FCRA Contributions

International Donations

Bank Name

State Bank of India, New Delhi Main Branch

Account Name

Welfare Centre for the Mentally Handicapped

Account No

40177091192

IFSC Code

SBIN0000691

SWIFT Code

SBININBB183

Anandalok is registered under FCRA to receive foreign contributions

After making your transfer, please email your transaction details to anandalok90@gmail.com so we can send you a receipt and 80G tax exemption certificate.

Your Trust Matters to Us

80G Tax Exemption

All contributions are exempt under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act 1961.

FCRA Approved

We are registered to receive international donations legally and transparently.

Since 1988

Registered under WB Societies Act XXVI of 1961, No. 5/61096 of 1988-89.

Transparency

Every rupee is accounted for. We maintain audited financial records for all funds.

Not Ready to Donate?
There Are Other Ways Your Heart Can Help.

Volunteer

Share your time, your skills, and your presence. Our residents light up when new faces visit.

Learn More →

Spread Awareness

Share our story with your family and friends. One post can reach the one family that needs us most.

Share Our Story →

Corporate Partnerships

We welcome CSR partnerships with companies that want their impact to have a face and a name.

Partner With Us →

Visit Anandalok

Come see it for yourself. Walk through the campus, meet the residents, watch them paint and dance.

Plan a Visit →

They Are Not Asking for Pity.
They Are Asking for a Canvas.

Somewhere in Kolkata right now, a parent is lying awake staring at the ceiling, wondering what happens to their child when they are gone. Your donation is the answer they are praying for. It does not matter if it is five thousand or fifty thousand. What matters is that you showed up.

Or call us at +91 9433739890 to discuss how you can help

Anandalok is a unit of Welfare Centre for the Mentally Handicapped (WCMH). All donations are tax exempt under 80G. Foreign contributions accepted under FCRA. Registration No. 5/61096 of 1988-89.

Anandalok

A residential care sanctuary for individuals with autism and intellectual disabilities. Empowering lives and nurturing potential since 1989.

80G Tax Exempt
FCRA Approved
